entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop species under investigation for yield and biomass improvement

entities.name: C4 RICE
entities.description: A conceptual version of rice utilizing the C4 photosynthetic pathway for higher efficiency

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural productivity of the plant

entities.name: C3 PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that use the C3 carbon fixation pathway, characterized by photorespiration

entities.name: C4 PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that use the C4 carbon fixation pathway, reducing photorespiration

entities.name: BIOMASS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the total biological mass of the plant

entities.name: PHOTORESPIRATION
entities.description: A metabolic process in C3 plants that leads to carbon loss and energy expenditure

entities.name: PHOTORESPIRATORY BYPASS
entities.description: A genetic mechanism designed to divert carbon from photorespiration to increase biomass

entities.name: NON-FOLIAR PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Photosynthetic activity occurring in non-leaf organs like grains and peduncles

entities.name: FOLIAR PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Photosynthetic activity occurring in the leaves

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing method used to analyze the transcriptome

entities.name: CPPDC
entities.description: Chloroplastic pyruvate dehydrogenase gene (BGIOSGA015796) involved in the photorespiratory bypass

entities.name: FLAG LEAF
entities.description: The primary foliar photosynthetic organ in rice
